Notice Of Motion And Motion Granting Leave For Sandra Cardona To File A Cross Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tara Macomber, Esq. 510-388-4949 of Open Door Legal for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SANDRA CARDONA'S Motion For Order Granting Leave for Sandra Cardona To File A Cross Complaint.

Grant. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
